steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “his right to hold the throne successfully” within a passage about establishing “questions of legitimacy.” The blank requires a verb describing how the monarch claims or asserts his right to rule.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Assert means to declare or state with confidence—to assert a right is to claim it openly and establish it. The monarch asserts his right to the throne successfully, thereby establishing his legitimacy as ruler. The other three choices describe actions that don't fit claiming a right to rule. That matches choice A — A is correct.
